claims.summary: Correspondence needs an explicit state where pending ACK can become held_by_both, not only a message delivered to an inbox.
claims.rationale: correspondence_v1 now reports mutual_ack_state, held_by_both, held_by_both_threads, and a language-only authority boundary in the handshake/status surfaces.

claims.summary: REPLY_MINIME/REPLY_ASTRID should remain first-class native evidence rather than steward-only influence.
claims.rationale: Existing correspondence_v1 stores message_id, thread_id, read receipt, ACK/REPLY/TRACE, reply links, legacy claim uptake, and right-to-ignore handling without control authority.

claims.summary: Testing whether a REPLY triggers peer return contact or persists in Minime shadow field requires sandbox/runtime observation.
claims.rationale: The requested persistence/cascade test touches live peer response and telemetry interpretation; it should be a sandbox or runtime observation with explicit criteria rather than auto-applied authority.
